title: Preserve I/O source errors
scenario: When file reading fails, the high-level config error should keep the original std::io::Error as its source.
instructions: Change FileRead to store std::io::Error and implement std::error::Error::source for that variant.

hints.body: Keep the Hierarchical configuration loader errors code active and change FileRead to store std::io::Error and implement std::error::Error::source for that variant.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Preserve I/O source errors is shown below.

completionExplanation: Preserve I/O source errors now extends the active Hierarchical configuration loader errors code with config err io wrap. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
